task_description: retrieve the DNS A records for github.com

trace.stdout:
Attempting to resolve all A records for github.com using socket.getaddrinfo
A record for github.com: 140.82.113.3

messages.content:
```python
import socket

print("Using socket to gethostbyname for github.com")
try:
    ip_address = socket.gethostbyname('github.com')
    print(f"A record for github.com: {ip_address}")
except socket.gaierror as e:
    print(f"Error resolving github.com: {e}")
```
